data.title: Think tank report on humanomics released by Xinhua News, in Nanjing, China. Includes around 33,000.
data.description: A report titled "The Jiangsu Practice of Humanomics" was unveiled on January 30 in Nanjing, China by the Xinhua News Agency Jiangsu Branch. The report, presented at the Release Conference on Research Outcomes of Humanomics in Jiangsu Province, is based on research findings from around 33,000 individuals.

data.title: Ex-Google engineer guilty of stealing AI secrets for China, convicted of espionage and theft of sensitive data by US jury.
data.description: After being charged with economic espionage and trade secret theft, Linwei Ding, a U.S. resident, was found guilty by a jury. The case involved the theft of sensitive AI infrastructure data belonging to Google.

data.title: Hong Kong Academy of Finance partners with Tsinghua PBCSF for fintech research, talent dev, policy collab in new MoU.
data.description: Hong Kong and mainland China have strengthened their financial connections with the signing of a Memorandum of Understanding (MoU) between the Academy of Finance (AoF) and Tsinghua PBCSF. This MoU encompasses areas such as fintech research, talent development, and policy collaboration. This agreement marks a significant step forward in enhancing cooperation between the two regions in the financial sector. It highlights the importance of joint efforts in promoting innovation and knowledge exchange. The collaboration is expected to facilitate the exchange of expertise and knowledge, benefiting both parties.

data.title: BTC drops below $84K, may dip to $50K. Support at $84K not held, potential worst-case scenario noted due to price decrease.
data.description: In a concerning development for Bitcoin investors, the price of BTC is at risk of plummeting to a new low of $50,000, following its failure to maintain the critical support level of $84,000. This significant drop in value highlights the volatility of the cryptocurrency market and the uncertainty surrounding its future trajectory. Investors are advised to monitor the situation closely and exercise caution in their trading decisions to mitigate potential losses.

data.title: Binance to convert $1 billion SAFU reserves to Bitcoin in 30 days, moving fund from USD to BTC, raising user protection concerns.
data.description: Binance is transitioning its insurance-style fund from US dollar-pegged assets to Bitcoin over the next month. This move has sparked concerns regarding user protection.

data.title: Tantech's U.S. subsidiary, Tanhome, secures "TANHOME" trademark from USPTO, boosting green building strategy. (Numerical details missing)
data.description: On January 30, 2026, Tantech Holdings Ltd. (Nasdaq: TANH) disclosed that its American branch, Tanhome Group Inc., was granted a Notice of Allowance (NOA) by the United States Patent and Trademark Office (USPTO) concerning a specific intellectual property matter.

data.title: TotalEnergies and Mozambique restart LNG project with over 4,000 workers, 40% complete, expecting first LNG in 2029.
data.description: On Thursday, TotalEnergies SE, in collaboration with the President of Mozambique, announced the complete restart of activities for the Mozambique LNG project. All project operations onshore and offshore have recommenced after the Mozambique LNG consortium decided on November 7, 2025, to lift the previously declared Force Majeure from 2021. TotalEnergies reported that construction has resumed at both offshore and onshore locations at the Afungi site, with a workforce of over 4,000 individuals, including more than 3,000 Mozambican nationals. The project has reached a 40% completion rate, and the first LNG production is anticipated in 2029. Most of the engineering and development work has been... Find further details on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Stock futures drop as investors await Trump's Fed Chair pick. $81.6 million bet on nomination. SanDisk up 20.53%, Apple down 0.34%.
data.description: U.S. stock futures dropped following a mixed Thursday close as speculation heightened over President Trump's choice for Federal Reserve Chair. Betting platform Kalshi reported over $81.6 million bet on the nomination, with Warsh leading at 92% probability. Treasury bond yields for the 10-year and two-year were at 4.26% and 3.56% respectively. Markets project an 84.7% chance of the Fed keeping interest rates static in March. Index performance slumped with Dow Jones -0.84%, S&P 500 -0.92%, Nasdaq 100 -1.13%, and Russell 2000 -1.51%. Pre-market, SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust slid 0.82% to $688.32, and Invesco QQQ Trust ETF dropped 1.05% to $622.80. Apple Inc. saw a dip despite strong Q1 fiscal results, while SanDisk Corp surged by 20.53% post upbeat Q2 earnings and a joint venture extension with Kioxia Corp till Dec 31, 2034.
